name: Mulligatawny Soup (Satterly)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chick peas, rinse them thoroughly, and cook until soft (45-60 minutes).
2. In a soup pot, sauté onions in ghee for 5 minutes.
3. Add chili, cayenne pepper, turmeric, and coriander; stir for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add stock and vegetables; simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Stir in the grated coconut, coconut milk, cooked chick peas, and cook an additional 5 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and let cool briefly.
7. Blend well and return to the pot.
8. Add lemon juice and cilantro; refrigerate to allow flavors to develop.
9. Reheat gently before serving.
This version omits traditional chicken stock but includes chick peas, as per the original recipe by Mark Satterly.
